channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Hacker News] Mozilla: The state of open source AI
item.description: Mozilla: The state of open source AI

item.title: [Hacker News] Claude Code: Anatomy of a Misfeature
item.description: Claude Code: Anatomy of a Misfeature

item.title: [Simon Willison] LLM cliché highlighter
item.description: LLM cliché highlighter

item.title: [Hacker News] Apple targets dozens of OpenAI employees with legal letters
item.description: Apple targets dozens of OpenAI employees with legal letters

item.title: [Hacker News] Blatant AI slop just won a 25k USD DeepMind Kaggle Grand Prize
item.description: Blatant AI slop just won a 25k USD DeepMind Kaggle Grand Prize

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/tirth8205 — Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
item.description: Local-first code intelligence tool for MCP and CLI that maps codebases to reduce context consumption for AI coding tools.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] RyanCodrai/turbovec — A vector index built on TurboQuant, written in Rust with Python bindings
item.description: turbovec is a Rust-based vector index built on TurboQuant with Python bindings.

item.title: [OpenAI] A scorecard for the AI age
item.description: A scorecard for the AI age

item.title: [Hacker News] EEG shows brain can simultaneous encode two speech streams
item.description: EEG shows brain can simultaneous encode two speech streams

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Just Keep Prompting: Evaluating Repetitive Socratic Prompting in VLMs
item.description: Vision-Language Models show significant instability and repeated answer flipping under sustained questioning in multi-turn evaluation, with effects strongly model-dependent.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Quantum Compositional NLP for Arabic: Grammar, Morphology, and Word Sense in Circuit Topology
item.description: First quantum compositional NLP for Arabic uses pregroup grammar-based circuits to test word order, morphology, and verb sense disambiguation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] LBA: Textual Hard-Label Adversarial Attack under Low Query Budgets
item.description: LBA improves adversarial text generation under low query budgets by using sampling-based methods instead of greedy algorithms to integrate prior and posterior knowledge.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] UniSAGE: Unifying Static and Dynamic Attributes with Hyper-Structure
item.description: UniSAGE unifies static and dynamic attributes in hierarchical data using an attribute graph and hyper-structure mechanism, achieving 10%+ performance improvements.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Latent Communication Between Language Model Agents: Channels, Alignment, and the Limits of Text
item.description: Research demonstrates latent communication between LLM agents preserves 99.4% semantic information compared to 80.4% for text-based communication.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] UzWordnet and Generative AI for Learning Uzbek by Game Playing
item.description: Educational system uses generative AI and games to teach Uzbek while improving UzWordnet lexical resource.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Automatically Evolving Prompt Guidelines for Task-Specific Optimization
item.description: AGOPS automatically generates task-specific prompt guidelines by evolving them based on reference answers, improving LLM performance on mathematical, medical, and coding tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Token Time Continuous Diffusion for Language Modeling
item.description: Token time continuous diffusion enables variable-speed token generation in continuous space, outperforming discrete diffusion models at high speedups.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Polestar: Drift-Aware Cache Calibration and Token Commitment for Efficient Inference of Diffusion LLMs
item.description: Polestar is a training-free inference framework for diffusion LLMs that uses token drift to improve cache efficiency and decoding parallelism.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Eta Given Delta: Defining LLM Tool Efficiency With Marginal Tool Utility
item.description: Researchers introduce tool efficiency metric to measure useful tool calls in LLM agents and optimize tool suites.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Simplicity Paradox: Debunking myths about prompting and datasets for LLM evaluation
item.description: Comprehensive study finds baseline prompting consistently outperforms sophisticated reasoning techniques across 10 MCQA datasets and 27 LLM configurations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MAPS: Modeling Co-Existing Subjective Perspectives and Shared Meaning in Multi-Agent Cognitive Dialogue
item.description: MAPS framework models dialogue between cognitively distinct agents, enabling them to maintain individualized reasoning while converging toward shared meaning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Introspection Fine-Tuning (IFT): Training Small LLMs to Introspect
item.description: Introspection Fine-Tuning enables small language models to detect internal activation perturbations, improving Llama-1B accuracy sixfold to 60.6%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Information-Theoretic Limits of Reliability and Scaling in Language Models
item.description: Research demonstrates information-theoretic reliability ceilings for language models that cannot be exceeded through scaling.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] T5-CSBoost: Adversarial Perturbation Resistant LLM Fingerprinting
item.description: T5-CSBoost improves LLM fingerprinting robustness using contrastive style regularization, achieving state-of-the-art on AIGT detection benchmarks under adversarial perturbations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CoEvoT: Co-Evolving Chain-of-Thought Prompting for Graph-LLM Reasoning
item.description: CoEvoT improves graph-LLM reasoning by iteratively refining graph tokens through Chain-of-Thought prompting steps.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] ReportMedSAM: Guiding Segmentation Through Radiology Reports
item.description: ReportMedSAM uses learnable concept embeddings from radiology reports to guide medical image segmentation via dynamic Mixture-of-Experts modules, improving scalability and linguistic robustness.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Heterogeneous Element-Aware Cross-Version Differencing of Scientific Documents via Layout-Aware Alignment and Structure-Aware Reasoning
item.description: Framework for detecting document version changes by analyzing heterogeneous elements (text, tables, formulas, figures) with layout awareness and structure-aware reasoning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Budgeted Subset Refinement for Execution-Aware LLM Research Ideation
item.description: Researchers introduce Budgeted Subset Refinement strategy to create more diverse and execution-aware portfolios from LLM-generated research ideas.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Semantic Register Compression in Multi-Agent LLM Cascades
item.description: Multi-agent LLM cascades systematically compress semantic information during text transformation, reducing decision accuracy across fact-checking, sentiment, and triage tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Cross-Dataset Generalization in Urdu Fake News Detection: An Empirical Study with XLM-RoBERTa and a Length Confound Analysis
item.description: Cross-dataset Urdu fake news study reveals length confound in datasets causes XLM-RoBERTa generalization failure.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Breaking Refusal in the First Half: A Mechanistic Study of the Prefill Jailbreak
item.description: Study shows aligned LLMs' refusal mechanism is shallow and localized to early response tokens, exploitable through simple prefill prompting.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Implicit Reasoning Steering via Concept Chaining
item.description: Research shows LLMs can be covertly steered toward specific answers through natural-language concept chaining without explicit instructions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Severance Problem: LLMs are Unaware of the Person Beyond the Prompt
item.description: Severance Schema encodes structured ignorance of unknown user information, reducing LLM sycophancy, harmful advice, and hallucination in personal assistants.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Multi-Head Latent Control: A Unified Interface for LLM Agent Decision Making
item.description: Multi-Head Latent Control infers agent control decisions from frozen LLM hidden states: proceeding, deferring to stronger models, seeking info, using tools, or abstaining.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PReM: Learning What to Preserve and When to Refresh for Context Compression
item.description: PReM framework learns what contextual information to preserve and when to refresh key-value memory, achieving 16x-32x compression on long contexts.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] HABIB_TAZ at SemEval-2026 Task 11: Disentangling Formal Logic from Content via Synthetic Training and Multi-Objective Optimization
item.description: HABIB_TAZ system achieves top rankings on SemEval-2026 Task 11, using synthetic data and multi-objective optimization to separate formal logic from content across multiple languages.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MamaBench: Benchmarking LLM Robustness in Maternal and Child Health Diagnosis through Counterfactual Clinical Perturbation
item.description: MamaBench benchmark shows LLM diagnostic accuracy is overstated by 16-28 points when evaluated on similar clinical cases.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] DS@GT ARC at LongEval: Citation Integrity and Factual Grounding in Scientific QA
item.description: Researchers show frontier RAG models prioritize fluency over citation integrity; propose evaluation metrics that reward strict grounding of answers in source material.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Smarter and Cheaper at Once: Byte-Exact KV-Cache Grafting Turns a Frozen Small Model into a Verified-Knowledge Flywheel
item.description: Byte-exact KV-cache grafting technique enables frozen models to restore verified solutions, boosting AIME performance from 80% to 93.3%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Position: Explainability Research Must Prioritize Foundations over Ad-hoc Methods
item.description: XAI research must prioritize foundational methodologies and evaluation frameworks over ad-hoc methods to enable real-world deployment.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] CARPRT: Class-Aware Zero-Shot Prompt Reweighting for Black-Box Vision-Language Models
item.description: CARPRT improves zero-shot image classification by applying class-specific weights to multiple prompts instead of shared weights across all classes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Explainable Geospatial AI for Satellite Ground Station Siting Using LiDAR-Derived Terrain Intelligence
item.description: Interpretable ML framework predicts clutter height for satellite ground station placement using LiDAR-derived data, improving ITU baseline accuracy by 60%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Certified Domain Consistency for Multi-Domain Retrieval: Label-Free Per-Domain Contamination Control with Conformal Risk Guarantees
item.description: C3R provides certified per-domain contamination control for multi-domain retrieval using conformal prediction without query-time labels.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] QFireNet: A Quantum-Enhanced U-Net for Wildfire Segmentation from Sentinel-2 Imagery
item.description: Quantum-enhanced U-Net with variational circuits outperforms classical baseline for wildfire segmentation from satellite imagery.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Branching Policy Optimization: Sandbox-Native Language Agent Reinforcement Learning
item.description: Branching Policy Optimization improves LLM agent training by exploiting sandbox properties to create shared-prefix rollout trees with reduced variance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] How Much of a 10-K Matters? Aggregation-Dependent Value of Full-Text versus Risk-Factor Sentiment
item.description: Supervised sentiment extraction from 10-K filings outperforms unsupervised methods, with optimal text scope varying by aggregation level.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Low-Latency Relay Selection in NR-V2X Vehicular Communications via Graph Isomorphism Networks with Edge Features
item.description: Graph Isomorphism Networks replace MILP for relay selection in V2X networks, reducing inference latency while maintaining 95.89% optimization accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] RENEW: Towards Learning World Models and Repairing Model Exploitation from Preferences
item.description: RENEW repairs offline RL world model exploitation by using human preferences over imagined rollouts, improving sample efficiency.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Closed-Loop Knowledge Dynamics: An Operational Framework for Saturation and Escape
item.description: Framework explains why closed-loop AI systems saturate under repeated feedback and proposes structural interventions to escape performance plateaus.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Temporal Machine Learning-Based Time-to-Event Model for Predicting ALS Progression and Healthcare Utilization
item.description: Machine learning model predicts ALS progression and assistive device requirements by analyzing longitudinal functional decline patterns.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] TEDDY: A Pediatric Foundation Model for Risk Forewarning from ICD-Coded Diagnostic Histories
item.description: Pediatric transformer TEDDY trained on 73M diagnoses predicts disease onset 2+ years early with 72% AUC, outperforming RNN and CNN baselines.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Long-term User Engagement Optimization through Model-agnostic Downstream Rewards Learning
item.description: Researchers develop a model-agnostic framework for optimizing long-term user engagement in recommender systems by deriving reward signals from early observable behaviors predictive of retention.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Augmentations for Robust and Efficient Imitation Learning in Streamed Video Games
item.description: Augmentations mimicking streaming artifacts improve imitation learning robustness in 3D video games when deployed under network latency and compression.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Privacy Leakage in Federated Learning in Radiology Reports: A Comparative Evaluation of Tokenizer-Driven Privacy Risks
item.description: Gradient inversion attacks on federated learning with radiology reports achieve 31-44% exact text reconstruction; reconstruction fidelity varies by tokenizer.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LIGO-PINN: Learned Initialization via Gated Optimization to Alleviate Convergence Failures in Physics Informed Neural Networks
item.description: LIGO-PINN addresses Physics-Informed Neural Network convergence failures using learned weight initialization via gated layerwise optimization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] MIDiff: Tackling Sparsity and Imbalance in Mobile Usage Generation via Multivariate-Imaging Diffusion
item.description: MIDiff, a diffusion framework using imaging transformations, generates synthetic mobile usage traces addressing sparsity and imbalance challenges.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Local Additive Feature Attribution: A Mathematical Taxonomy and Reporting Checklist
item.description: Survey establishes that feature-attribution results are meaningful only relative to their mathematical assumptions, proposes unified framework and reporting standards.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Lyapunov Guidance: A Unified Framework for Stabilizing Generative Flows
item.description: Lyapunov-guided framework provides stability guarantees for post-training flow models, unifying guidance methods like classifier and reward guidance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] NeuroGRIP: Retrieval-Augmented Graph Refinement for Knowledge-Grounded EEG Seizure Diagnosis
item.description: NeuroGRIP improves EEG seizure diagnosis by incorporating clinical knowledge into graph neural networks to prune medically implausible connections.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Towards a Unified Multidimensional Explainability Metric: Evaluating Trustworthiness in AI Models
item.description: Researchers propose a framework using fidelity, simplicity, and stability metrics to create a unified score for evaluating XAI method explainability across different models and datasets.
